analysis: The project has multiple HTML files with different themes. The 'docs' folder appears to be the main documentation site. The event.json specifies a theme related to black holes with animated objects and slides. The current CSS files need to be updated to reflect a cosmic, dark theme with black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Update the CSS to include a dark cosmic theme with black hole visuals, swirling animations, and glowing elements. Add animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Fix any syntax errors and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in docs/index.html.
